name: Welsh Broth- Cawl
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove as much debris as possible from the lamb cutlets.
2. Gently boil the meat in water for 1 hour, skimming off any fat.
3. Peel and chop the vegetables (leeks, carrots, parsnips, and swede).
4. Add the chopped vegetables to the pot with the boiled lamb.
5. Add salt and pepper to taste.
6. Cover and simmer until the vegetables are tender.
